examples: The door in the ivied wall had been pushed gently open and a woman had entered.
He crossed the lawn and turned into the Long Walk by the ivied walls.
He did not refer to spires and towers, to campus greens and ivied walls.
After hours of this dance with the elements, we repaired to the ivied big house which was the former holiday pad of the Marquis of Sligo, Baron of Mont Eagle and Earl of Altamont.
